veilleAo.metaTitle: Automated tender monitoring — never miss a tender again | ZetisLabs
veilleAo.metaDescription: We set up a system that scans the BOAMP, regional platforms and AWS Achats, filters tenders against your criteria, and sends them to you at the frequency you choose: real time, daily, or weekly. The code is yours.

title.lead: You comb through the BOAMP every week.

hero.subtitle: A system that scans the public sources, filters by your criteria, and sends you what concerns you. In real time, daily, or weekly, you choose. 30 minutes of reading instead of 6 hours of searching.

problem.title: The tender you never saw.
body: The BOAMP and regional platforms publish hundreds of tenders every week. You go through them one by one. You look for the lots that match your trade, you filter by area, by amount, by contract type.
By the end of the week, you've spent the equivalent of a full working day on monitoring. And you're still not sure you didn't miss anything.
problem.conclusion: Because the real problem isn't the time spent. It's the tender you never saw.

solution.title: A short-list, at your pace.
solution.body: We set up a system that scans the public sources (BOAMP, regional platforms, AWS Achats), filters tenders against your precise criteria, and sends you what actually concerns you. In real time, daily, or weekly, you choose.
solution.highlight: 30 minutes reading it, instead of 6 hours hunting for it.

features.title: Multi-source scraper
features.description: BOAMP, regional platforms, AWS Achats — scanned continuously.

features.title: Profile-based filtering
features.description: Trade, area, amount, lots, CPV codes. Your criteria, not a recommendation.

features.title: Learning
features.description: The system remembers the tenders that interest you and sharpens over time.

features.title: Delivered how you want
features.description: Email, Telegram, WhatsApp or CRM — in real time, daily, or weekly.

notification.title: Your watch, delivered.
notification.subtitle: At the frequency you choose (real time, daily, or weekly), on the channel of your choice.
notification.factual: The match score is factual: it's the number of your criteria that match. The tool never tells you to "bid on this one". You decide.

deliverables.title: The whole system — yours.
items: Source code of the monitoring pipeline
Automatic notifications (real time, daily, or weekly)
deliverables.note: The code is yours. The monthly maintenance covers updates and support. It's optional: without it, the system keeps running.

pricing.title: Clear pricing, no surprises.

catalogue.label: Catalogue price
catalogue.setupNote: one-off — configuration, source connection, filtering on your criteria, test on real data.
catalogue.maintenanceNote: criteria adjustments, new sources, fixes if a scraper breaks.

founder.label: Founder price
founder.guarantee: Price locked for life as long as the subscription is active.
founder.exchange: In exchange: your feedback on the product for the first 3 months, and a testimonial if it works.

pricing.comparison: A high-end tender-monitoring SaaS charges €300 to €500/month, i.e. €3,600 to €6,000 a year, every year. ZetisLabs: €2,000 once, then €150/month. From the second year on, you pay two to three times less. And the code is yours.

process.title: From your criteria to your first watch.

steps.title: We define your criteria
steps.description: Trade, geographic area, amount ranges, target lots, CPV codes. Everything that makes a tender relevant to you — or not.

steps.title: We build
steps.description: Source connection, AI filtering system, notification format.

steps.title: We test on a real week
steps.description: You receive your first watch. We adjust the criteria if needed.

steps.title: We hand it over
steps.description: Code, configuration, documentation, training. It's yours.

finalCta.title: Stop hunting for tenders by hand.
finalCta.subtitle: 30 minutes to see if it fits your business — with a live demo on the call.

contact.title: Let's talk about your processes

hero.subtitle: Your teams waste time on repetitive tasks? We automate them so you can focus on what truly moves your business forward.

ProblemSolution.titleProblem: How many hours lost this week?
ProblemSolution.description:
Copy-pasting data between tools
Sending the same follow-up emails
Generating reports manually
Checking Excel spreadsheets
Answering the same questions

These tasks don't create value. They consume time. Your time.
ProblemSolution.body: We analyze how you work. We identify time-consuming tasks. And we create custom automations that do the work for you.
ProblemSolution.accent: Result: your teams focus on what matters. You see the difference in your results.

first.title: Sales management
first.description: A CRM that updates automatically from your emails, generates follow-ups, and produces a weekly report.

second.title: Customer support
second.description: An AI agent that answers frequently asked questions, sorts requests, and escalates urgent issues.

third.title: Administrative
third.description: Invoices generated automatically, payment reminders, accounting synchronization.

Process.label: Process
Process.title: How it works
Process.subtitle: Simple steps to transform your workflow

4.title: Results
4.description: You measure the time saved from the first month

1.question: How much does it cost?
1.response: Every project is different. We always start with a free 30-minute audit to estimate the scope and give you a clear quote, with no surprises.

2.question: How long until I see results?
2.response: The first automations are typically in place within 2 to 4 weeks. You'll measure the time saved from the first month.

3.question: Does it work with my current tools?
3.response: Yes. We adapt to your existing stack — CRM, ERP, business tools, Google Workspace, etc. No need to change everything.

4.question: What if it doesn't work for me?
4.response: The audit is free and comes with no commitment. You then decide whether to move forward or not, in full transparency.

5.question: What's the difference from no-code tools like Zapier?
5.response: We develop native code, not visual workflows. Result: more flexibility, fewer limitations, and solutions that stand the test of time.

cta.title: How many hours could you get back?
cta.description: Free audit. We analyze your processes and tell you where you can save time.
